Why SmartglobalwealthFx?

Founded in 2019, SmartglobalwealthFx emerged with a global digital perspective, aimed at empowering both seasoned professionals and novice investors to navigate the financial markets with ease and confidence. Our mission is to foster a simple and risk-free environment for all participants.

  • Our Advantages
  • Our Mission
  • Our Guarantees

We offer investment options characterized by fairness, with all transactional data securely stored on the blockchain. This innovative approach enables the creation, transfer, and verification of financial data with utmost security, free from the interference of third parties.

At our core, we are committed to guiding you onto the path of financial success and ensuring that every investment option yields profitable returns, regardless of where you are in your investing journey.

Our presence is driven by a passion for open and transparent markets, with a dedication to being a pivotal force in promoting widespread adoption. We guarantee maximum profitability through our platform while also prioritizing the safeguarding of your data.

Read More

About Us

SmartglobalwealthFx presents premier investment opportunities across the forex, options, and cryptocurrency arenas. As a pioneering and highly reputable entity, SmartglobalwealthFx ensures the absolute security and safety of your investments. Rest assured, our mission is dedicated to simplifying and expediting the process of acquiring cryptocurrencies for all individuals.

Bitcoin stands as one of the most pivotal inventions in human history. For the very first time, individuals have the unprecedented ability to send or receive any sum of money with anyone, regardless of location, conveniently and without constraints. This marks the emergence of a new era—a world that is freer and more accessible to all.

Ken Williams - Trade Analyst

Risk Warning

Trading derivatives entails a significant risk to your capital, necessitating the involvement of professionals capable of effectively managing your portfolio and mitigating risks. It's crucial to recognize that trading derivatives may not be suitable for all investors. Therefore, it is imperative that you thoroughly comprehend the associated risks and consider seeking independent advice before engaging in trading independently.

According to data sourced from an independent third party, our EUR/USD spread consistently ranked within the top 96% throughout the period from January to December 2019. This performance was assessed against a sample group of 32 direct competitors in the Forex industry, based on an aggregated weekly spread average. Additionally, the average order execution time—from the moment the trade is received, processed, to confirmed execution—stands at 36.5 milliseconds. This information is referenced from the Finance Magnates Q2 2020 Intelligence Report.
